vne_powered_to_3000ft.notes: At 2200 lb (998 kg) TOGW or above. For reductions with altitude and temperature see Vne placard. Below 2200 lb TOGW add 10 KIAS.

vne_above_3000ft.notes: Vne varies with altitude, temperature, and weight per placard table. No single fixed value above 3000 ft; see placard on page 2-10.

airspeed_indicator_green_arc_min.notes: Green arc 0 to 110 KIAS on airspeed indicator

airspeed_indicator_red_line.notes: Red line on airspeed indicator; also maximum below 2200 lb TOGW Vne

power_on_max.notes: Maximum continuous power on rotor speed

power_on_min.notes: Minimum continuous power on rotor speed

power_on_min_o320_variant.notes: Not applicable — R66 uses Rolls-Royce 250-C300/A1 turbine engine, no O-320 variant referenced

max_gross_alpha_beta_beta_ii.notes: Alpha/Beta/Beta II designations not applicable to R66; single max gross weight of 2700 lb applies

max_per_seat_including_baggage.notes: Maximum per seat including under-seat compartment

max_per_baggage_compartment.notes: Maximum total load in main baggage compartment; maximum distributed floor load 50 lb/ft² (244 kg/m²). Under-seat compartment maximum is 50 lb (23 kg) each.

min_solo_pilot_weight.notes: With all doors installed and no load in baggage compartment, solo pilot weight of 160 lb (73 kg) or greater ensures CG within limits. Below 160 lb, compute weight and balance; removable ballast may be required.

max_operating_density_altitude.notes: Maximum operating density altitude 14,000 feet. Also: maximum operating altitude 9000 feet AGL to allow landing within 5 minutes in case of fire. Closing throttle in flight prohibited above 10,000 feet density altitude.

speed_max_transient.notes: Output shaft speed (N2) maximum transient overspeed. Avoid large, rapid power changes. Intentional operation outside continuous RPM limits is prohibited.

cht_max.notes: R66 is turbine-powered; no cylinder head temperature (CHT) limit listed. MGT (Measured Gas Temperature) continuous limit is 706°C, 5-minute limit 782°C, transient 843°C (6 sec), start limit 927°C (10 sec).

oil_pressure_min_flight.notes: Minimum oil pressure above 94% N1. From 78% to 94% N1 minimum is 90 psi.

oil_pressure_max_start_warmup.notes: Maximum oil pressure during start and warm up

carb_air_temp_caution_range_min.notes: R66 is turbine-powered with no carburetor; no carb air temperature limits apply

carb_air_temp_caution_range_max.notes: R66 is turbine-powered with no carburetor; no carb air temperature limits apply

approved_grades: Jet A (ASTM D1655) — not approved below -32°C (-25°F); anti-icing additive may be required below 4°C
Jet A-1 (ASTM D1655) — not approved below -32°C (-25°F); anti-icing additive may be required below 4°C
Jet B (ASTM D6615) — not approved above 32°C (90°F) at altitudes above 5000 ft; anti-icing additive may be required below 4°C
JP-4 (MIL-DTL-5624) — not approved above 32°C (90°F) at altitudes above 5000 ft
No. 3 Jet Fuel (P.R. China GB 6537-2006) — not approved below -32°C (-25°F); anti-icing additive may be required below 4°C
TC-1 or PT (Russian Standard GOST 10227) — no temperature restrictions; aviation fuel additives grades И (Fluid I) and ИМ (Fluid IM) at 0.1–0.3% by volume approved for anti-icing

required_equipment_for_dispatch: Landing lights operational for VFR night operations
Navigation lights operational for VFR night operations
Instrument lights operational for VFR night operations
Anti-collision lights operational for VFR night operations
A functioning headset must be worn by each pilot
Forward left seat belt must be buckled
Engine anti-ice must be on for operation in visible moisture at or below 4°C (40°F)

flight_restrictions.notes: A pushover from level flight or following a pull-up causes low-G condition which can result in catastrophic loss of lateral control

flight_restrictions.item: Closing throttle (twist grip) in flight above 10,000 feet density altitude
Closing throttle (twist grip) in flight with cabin heat ON
Solo flight from right seat only
flight_restrictions.notes: Minimum crew is one pilot in the right front seat. A flight instructor may act as PIC from left front seat.

flight_restrictions.item: Functioning headset worn by each pilot
Engine anti-ice on in visible moisture at or below 4°C (40°F)

flight_restrictions.notes: Up to 100 KIAS approved with any combination of cabin doors removed. All seat belts must be buckled and loose items properly secured.

flight_restrictions.item: 100 KIAS maximum with any combination of cabin doors removed

flight_restrictions.notes: Night VFR only when landing, navigation, instrument, and anti-collision lights are operational and visual reference to ground maintained
Only VFR day and night operations are approved
To allow landing within 5 minutes in case of fire

flight_restrictions.item: Rear cabin door locking in flight
flight_restrictions.notes: Placard: DO NOT LOCK IN FLIGHT

flight_restrictions.item: Anti-icing additive in Jet A, Jet A-1, Jet B, or No. 3 Jet Fuel when ambient temperature below 4°C (40°F)
flight_restrictions.notes: Conforming to MIL-DTL-85470; check with fuel supplier to determine if supply includes additive

faa_ad_95_26_04.note: FAA AD 95-26-04 is specific to Robinson R22/R44 piston helicopters and is not referenced in the R66 POH Section 2. No applicable limitations found.

limitations.notes: This AD applies to R22/R44 piston helicopters. The R66 is a turbine helicopter and this AD is not referenced in the R66 POH Section 2.
